svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="file-upload-session-states" name="File Upload Session States"> <mxGraphModel dx="-534" dy="-207" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pending" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1" value="pending" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="120" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="processing" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1" value="processing (*)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="528" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="complete" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontStyle=1" value="complete" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="814" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="error" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontStyle=1" value="error" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="528" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="canceled" parent="1" style="strokeWidth=2;html=1;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.terminator;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;" value="<b>canceled</b><br><i>(terminal)</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="147" x="815.5" y="393" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;fontStyle=2;" value="(*) cancel during processing is rejected with <font face="Courier New">409</font> (not a transition)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="223" y="487" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="begin" parent="1" style="strokeWidth=2;html=1;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.start_1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;" value="begin file upload session" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="130" x="130" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="forkjoin" parent="1" style="strokeWidth=2;html=1;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.annotation_2;align=left;labelPosition=right;pointerEvents=1;overflow=visible;direction=east;noLabel=0;labelPadding=0;movableLabel=1;" value="upload mechanism<div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="77" width="50" x="65" y="196.5" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-61" y="67" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="strokeWidth=2;html=1;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.decision;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="63" width="63" x="350" y="203.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_begin_pending" edge="1" parent="1" source="begin" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="pending"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pending_d1" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="d1" value="complete"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.075" y="15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_d1_complete" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="complete" value="immediate (<font face="Courier New">201</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" y="13" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="382" y="165" /> <mxPoint x="889" y="165" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_d1_processing" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="processing" value="deferred (<font face="Courier New">202</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0087" y="14" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_d1_error" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="error" value="failure (<font face="Courier New">4xx/5xx</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5213" y="16" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="381" y="425" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_processing_complete" edge="1" parent="1" source="processing" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="complete" value="success"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="13" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_processing_error" edge="1" parent="1" source="processing" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="error" value="failure"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pending_canceled" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="canceled" value="cancel (<font face="Courier New">DELETE</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1706" y="18" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="195" y="589" /> <mxPoint x="889" y="589" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_complete_canceled" edge="1" parent="1" source="complete" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="canceled" value="delete file (<font face="Courier New">DELETE</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_error_canceled" edge="1" parent="1" source="error" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="canceled" value="delete file (<font face="Courier New">DELETE</font>)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.04" y="14" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
